---
title: "script"
author: "jincanzhi"
date: "2025-12-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsci)
set.seed(113)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir =dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()[["path"]]))
```

#wilcox_KO
```{r}
ko_table <- read.delim("./data/Bacteria.kegg.anno.profile",row.names = 1,check.names = F)
KO_list <- read.csv("./data/KO_list.csv",header = F)

alpha <- 0.05
res_list <- list()

for (ko in KO_list$V1) {
  rp <- as.numeric(ko_table[ko, 1:17])
  rs <- as.numeric(ko_table[ko, 18:34])
  
  tmp_data <- data.frame(
    Value = c(rp, rs),
    Group = factor(rep(c("RP", "RS"), each = 17), levels = c("RP", "RS"))
  )
  
  wt_greater <- wilcox_test(Value ~ Group, data = tmp_data,
                            paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE,
                            alternative = "greater")
  wt_less    <- wilcox_test(Value ~ Group, data = tmp_data,
                            paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE,
                            alternative = "less")
  
  res_list[[ko]] <- data.frame(
    KO          = ko,
    W_greater   = wt_greater$statistic,
    p_greater   = wt_greater$p,
    W_less      = wt_less$statistic,
    p_less      = wt_less$p,
    median_RP   = median(rp, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RS   = median(rs, na.rm = TRUE),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

results_df <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

results_df$p_greater_adj <- p.adjust(results_df$p_greater, method = "fdr")
results_df$p_less_adj    <- p.adjust(results_df$p_less,    method = "fdr")

results_df$Direction <- with(results_df, {
  dir <- rep("NS", nrow(results_df))
  
  idx_g <- p_greater_adj < alpha & p_less_adj >= alpha
  dir[idx_g] <- "greater"
  idx_l <- p_less_adj < alpha & p_greater_adj >= alpha
  dir[idx_l] <- "less"
  
  idx_both <- p_greater_adj < alpha & p_less_adj < alpha
  pick_greater <- idx_both & (p_greater_adj <= p_less_adj)
  pick_less    <- idx_both & (p_less_adj  <  p_greater_adj)
  dir[pick_greater] <- "greater"
  dir[pick_less]    <- "less"
  
  dir
})

results_df$W_signif <- ifelse(results_df$Direction == "greater",
                              results_df$W_greater,
                              ifelse(results_df$Direction == "less",
                                     results_df$W_less, NA))
results_df$p_adj_signif <- ifelse(results_df$Direction == "greater",
                                  results_df$p_greater_adj,
                                  ifelse(results_df$Direction == "less",
                                         results_df$p_less_adj, NA))

final_df <- results_df[, c("KO", "Direction", "W_signif", "p_adj_signif",
                           "median_RP", "median_RS")]
final_df$Direction
names(final_df)[3:4] <- c("W", "p_adj")
final_df$Direction <- ifelse(final_df$Direction == "greater", "RP_enrich",
                             ifelse(final_df$Direction == "less", "RS_enrich", "NS"))
write.csv(final_df, "./data/N_cycle_KO_wilcox_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#wilcox_process
```{r}
KO_abun <- read.delim("./data/Bacteria.kegg.anno.profile",row.names = 1)
nitro_info <- read.csv("./data/Nitro_KO.csv")

KO_abun_df <- KO_abun %>% 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("KO")

combined_data <- inner_join(nitro_info, KO_abun_df, by = "KO")

ko_table <- combined_data %>%
  select(-c(2, 3)) %>%
  group_by(Process) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  column_to_rownames("Process")

alpha <- 0.05
res_list <- list()

for (ko in rownames(ko_table)) {
  rp <- as.numeric(ko_table[ko, 1:17])
  rs <- as.numeric(ko_table[ko, 18:34])
  
  tmp_data <- data.frame(
    Value = c(rp, rs),
    Group = factor(rep(c("RP", "RS"), each = 17), levels = c("RP", "RS"))
  )
  
  wt_greater <- wilcox_test(Value ~ Group, data = tmp_data,
                            paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE,
                            alternative = "greater")
  wt_less    <- wilcox_test(Value ~ Group, data = tmp_data,
                            paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE,
                            alternative = "less")
  
  res_list[[ko]] <- data.frame(
    KO          = ko,
    W_greater   = wt_greater$statistic,
    p_greater   = wt_greater$p,
    W_less      = wt_less$statistic,
    p_less      = wt_less$p,
    median_RP   = median(rp, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RS   = median(rs, na.rm = TRUE),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

results_df <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

results_df$p_greater_adj <- p.adjust(results_df$p_greater, method = "fdr")
results_df$p_less_adj    <- p.adjust(results_df$p_less,    method = "fdr")

results_df$Direction <- with(results_df, {
  dir <- rep("NS", nrow(results_df))
  
  idx_g <- p_greater_adj < alpha & p_less_adj >= alpha
  dir[idx_g] <- "greater"
  idx_l <- p_less_adj < alpha & p_greater_adj >= alpha
  dir[idx_l] <- "less"
  
  idx_both <- p_greater_adj < alpha & p_less_adj < alpha
  pick_greater <- idx_both & (p_greater_adj <= p_less_adj)
  pick_less    <- idx_both & (p_less_adj  <  p_greater_adj)
  dir[pick_greater] <- "greater"
  dir[pick_less]    <- "less"
  
  dir
})

results_df$W_signif <- ifelse(results_df$Direction == "greater",
                              results_df$W_greater,
                              ifelse(results_df$Direction == "less",
                                     results_df$W_less, NA))
results_df$p_adj_signif <- ifelse(results_df$Direction == "greater",
                                  results_df$p_greater_adj,
                                  ifelse(results_df$Direction == "less",
                                         results_df$p_less_adj, NA))

final_df <- results_df[, c("KO", "Direction", "W_signif", "p_adj_signif",
                           "median_RP", "median_RS")]
final_df$Direction
names(final_df)[3:4] <- c("W", "p_adj")
final_df$Direction <- ifelse(final_df$Direction == "greater", "RP_enrich",
                             ifelse(final_df$Direction == "less", "RS_enrich", "NS"))
write.csv(final_df, "./data/N_cycle_process_wilcox_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#wilcox_stage
```{r}
KO_abun <- read.delim("./data/Bacteria.kegg.anno.profile",row.names = 1)
nitro_info <- read.csv("./data/Nitro_KO.csv")

KO_abun_df <- KO_abun %>% 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("KO")

combined_data <- inner_join(nitro_info, KO_abun_df, by = "KO")

ko_table <- combined_data %>%
  select(-c(1, 3)) %>%
  group_by(stage) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  column_to_rownames("stage")

alpha <- 0.05
res_list <- list()

for (ko in rownames(ko_table)) {
  rp <- as.numeric(ko_table[ko, 1:17])
  rs <- as.numeric(ko_table[ko, 18:34])
  
  tmp_data <- data.frame(
    Value = c(rp, rs),
    Group = factor(rep(c("RP", "RS"), each = 17), levels = c("RP", "RS"))
  )
  
  wt_greater <- wilcox_test(Value ~ Group, data = tmp_data,
                            paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE,
                            alternative = "greater")
  wt_less    <- wilcox_test(Value ~ Group, data = tmp_data,
                            paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE,
                            alternative = "less")
  
  res_list[[ko]] <- data.frame(
    KO          = ko,
    W_greater   = wt_greater$statistic,
    p_greater   = wt_greater$p,
    W_less      = wt_less$statistic,
    p_less      = wt_less$p,
    median_RP   = median(rp, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RS   = median(rs, na.rm = TRUE),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

results_df <- do.call(rbind, res_list)

results_df$p_greater_adj <- p.adjust(results_df$p_greater, method = "fdr")
results_df$p_less_adj    <- p.adjust(results_df$p_less,    method = "fdr")

results_df$Direction <- with(results_df, {
  dir <- rep("NS", nrow(results_df))
  
  idx_g <- p_greater_adj < alpha & p_less_adj >= alpha
  dir[idx_g] <- "greater"
  idx_l <- p_less_adj < alpha & p_greater_adj >= alpha
  dir[idx_l] <- "less"
  
  idx_both <- p_greater_adj < alpha & p_less_adj < alpha
  pick_greater <- idx_both & (p_greater_adj <= p_less_adj)
  pick_less    <- idx_both & (p_less_adj  <  p_greater_adj)
  dir[pick_greater] <- "greater"
  dir[pick_less]    <- "less"
  
  dir
})

results_df$W_signif <- ifelse(results_df$Direction == "greater",
                              results_df$W_greater,
                              ifelse(results_df$Direction == "less",
                                     results_df$W_less, NA))
results_df$p_adj_signif <- ifelse(results_df$Direction == "greater",
                                  results_df$p_greater_adj,
                                  ifelse(results_df$Direction == "less",
                                         results_df$p_less_adj, NA))

final_df <- results_df[, c("KO", "Direction", "W_signif", "p_adj_signif",
                           "median_RP", "median_RS")]
final_df$Direction
names(final_df)[3:4] <- c("W", "p_adj")
final_df$Direction <- ifelse(final_df$Direction == "greater", "RP_enrich",
                             ifelse(final_df$Direction == "less", "RS_enrich", "NS"))
write.csv(final_df, "./data/N_cycle_stage_wilcox_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#Figure5C
```{r}
df <- read.csv("./data/Nitro_process.csv")

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Process,
    names_to = "Group",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

p1<-ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Process, y = Value, fill = Group)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.7,color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Rhizoplane" = "#D55E00", "Rhizosphere" = "#0072B2"),
    labels = c("Rhizoplane", "Rhizosphere"),
    name = "Region"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    y = "Abundance"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 10, color = 'black',face = "bold"), 
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = 'black'),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 45,vjust = 1,hjust = 1,color = 'black'),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
        panel.background = element_blank(), 
        panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black",linewidth = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
        legend.background = element_blank()
        )

```


#Figure5D
```{r}
data <- read.csv("./data/nitro_tax.csv",check.names = F)

data_long <- data %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(tax, genus, phylum), 
               names_to = "Function", 
               values_to = "Abundance") %>% 
  separate(Function, into = c("Process", "Type"), sep = "_", extra = "merge") %>% 
  group_by(phylum, Process, Type) %>% 
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

data_long$Process <- factor(data_long$Process, 
                            levels = c("Dissimilatory nitrate reduction", 
                                       "Denitrification", 
                                       "Nitrification", 
                                       "Assimilatory nitrate reduction", 
                                       "Anammox", 
                                       "Nitrogen fixation"))

phylum_colors <- brewer.pal(length(unique(data_long$phylum)), "Set3")
names(phylum_colors) <- unique(data_long$phylum)

p2 <- ggplot(data_long, aes(x = Process, y = Abundance, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8, 
           color = "black", linewidth = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~Type, ncol = 2, 
             labeller = labeller(Type = c("RP" = "Rhizoplane", "RS" = "Rhizosphere"))) +
  scale_fill_npg(name = "Phylum") +  
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) + 
  labs(
    title = NULL,
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, color = "black", 
                                margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 10, "mm"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm")
  )

combined_plot <- p1 + p2 +plot_layout(widths = c(3, 5))

height <-15
width <- 21
ggsave("./Figure/Figure5CD.pdf",plot = combined_plot,width = width,height = height,units = "cm",dpi = 600,paper="a4")
ggsave("./Figure/Figure5CD.png",plot = combined_plot,width = width,height = height,units = "cm",dpi = 600)

```
